name: “两次”麦考伊 | 战术空中管制部队装甲兵
nameZh: “两次”麦考伊 | 战术空中管制部队装甲兵
descriptionEn: 'Two Times' McCoy earned his nickname by completing TACP's field training twice. Official records mark this up to a scheduling mix-up, but his teammates report restraining him from completing the trifecta. With inhuman reserves of physical and mental stamina, McCoy often finds himself the last person standing at the end of any conflict—physical and verbal alike. His yellow scarf is a tribute to his time with 1st Cavalry Division. Yep. Still here.
descriptionZh: 在海豹部队完成两次臭名昭著的地狱周末训练后，麦考伊被人取了个外号。不太确定是出于安排上的混乱，还是说他享受这个过程。 总之，麦考伊拥有超出常人的体力和意志力。他常常发现，自己就是那个总能在各种打斗中坚持到最后一刻的人。他的黄领巾是对他在第一骑兵师的纪念。 没错，他还在。
